title: PPIP - Share data button presented after log out
scenario: Share data toggle reappears inconsistently after logout and disappears after login in App Settings > General > Account
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. On the Home screen, tap the Account icon or navigate to Account.
3. During initial onboarding, tap "Continue as Guest".
4. When prompted with the Share data option, select either "Share" or "Don't Share".
5. Complete onboarding and land on the Home screen.
6. Navigate to App Settings → General → Account.
7. Observe the "Share data" toggle — note its ON/OFF state.
8. Log out of the app (if logged in as guest, switch to login).
9. After logout, navigate again to App Settings → General → Account.
10. Observe the "Share data" toggle — it should still be visible and reflect the choice made in step 4.
11. Now log in with valid Poly credentials.
12. After login, navigate to App Settings → General → Account.
13. Observe whether the "Share data" toggle is still visible.
expected: The "Share data" toggle should remain visible in App Settings > General > Account after logging out, and also remain visible after logging in with Poly credentials, reflecting the user's original choice.
